Equipment Details

Plant number is taken from the Hours list. Press Sync to download the latest Google Sheets data first, then upload your pending local changes. Select plant number first. Machine type and machine model will fill automatically. Current hours from the selected machine will auto-fill into Service hours for smoother capture.
